name: Risk of Rain 2
description: Escape a chaotic alien planet by fighting through hordes of frenzied monsters – with your friends, or on your own.

options.label: Progression Balancing
options.description: A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

options.label: Accessibility
options.description: Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

options.label: Goal
options.description: Classic Mode: Every Item pickup increases fills a progress bar which gives location checks.

options.label: Victory
options.description: Mithrix: Defeat Mithrix in Commencement Voidling: Defeat the Voidling in The Planetarium (SOTV DLC required!

options.label: Total Locations
options.description: Classic Mode: Number of location checks which are added to the Risk of Rain playthrough.

options.label: Chests Per Stage
options.description: Explore Mode: The number of chest locations per environment.

options.label: Shrines Per Stage
options.description: Explore Mode: The number of shrine locations per environment.

options.label: Scavengers Per Stage
options.description: Explore Mode: The number of scavenger locations per environment.

options.label: Scanner Per Stage
options.description: Explore Mode: The number of scanners locations per environment.

options.label: Altars Per Stage
options.description: Explore Mode: The number of altars locations per environment.

options.label: Total Revivals
options.description: Total Percentage of `Dio's Best Friend` item put in the item pool.

options.label: Start With Revive
options.description: Start the game with a `Dio's Best Friend` item.

options.label: Final Stage Death
options.description: The following will count as a win if set to "true", and victory is set to "any": Dying in Commencement.

options.label: Dlc Sotv
options.description: Enable if you are using Survivors of the Void DLC.

options.label: Dlc Sots
options.description: Enable if you are using Seekers of the Storm DLC.

options.label: Require Stages
options.description: Add Stage items to the pool to block access to the next set of environments.

options.label: Progressive Stages
options.description: This will convert Stage items to be a progressive item.

options.label: Stage Variants
options.description: Enable if you want to include stage variants in the environment pool.

options.label: Show Seer Portals
options.description: Shows Seer Portals at the teleporter to allow choosing the next environment.

options.label: Death Link
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies.

options.label: Item Pickup Step
options.description: Number of items to pick up before an AP Check is completed.

options.label: Shrine Use Step
options.description: Explore Mode: Number of shrines to use up before an AP Check is completed.

options.label: Enable Trap
options.description: Allows Trap items in the item pool.

options.label: Enable Lunar
options.description: Allows Lunar items in the item pool.

options.label: Item Weights
options.description: Set Use Item Weight Presets to yes if you want to use one of these presets.

options.label: Item Pool Presets
options.description: Will use the item weight presets when set to true, otherwise will use the custom set item pool weights.

options.label: White Scrap
options.description: Weight of white scraps in the item pool.

options.label: Green Scrap
options.description: Weight of Green Scraps in the item pool.

options.label: Yellow Scrap
options.description: Weight of yellow scraps in the item pool.

options.label: Red Scrap
options.description: Weight of Red Scraps in the item pool.

options.label: Common Item
options.description: Weight of common items in the item pool.

options.label: Uncommon Item
options.description: Weight of uncommon items in the item pool.

options.label: Legendary Item
options.description: Weight of legendary items in the item pool.

options.label: Boss Item
options.description: Weight of boss items in the item pool.

options.label: Lunar Item
options.description: Weight of lunar items in the item pool.

options.label: Void Item
options.description: Weight of void items in the item pool.

options.label: Equipment
options.description: Weight of equipment items in the item pool.

options.label: Money
options.description: Weight of money items in the item pool.

options.label: Lunar Coin
options.description: Weight of lunar coin items in the item pool.

options.label: Experience
options.description: Weight of 1000 exp items in the item pool.

options.label: Mountain Trap
options.description: Weight of mountain trap items in the item pool.

options.label: Time Warp Trap
options.description: Weight of time warp trap items in the item pool.

options.label: Combat Trap
options.description: Weight of combat trap items in the item pool.

options.label: Teleport Trap
options.description: Weight of teleport trap items in the item pool.
